message:
web: Require proof-of-possession for blob references in ingest

Add validation that all blob SHA256s referenced in a transcript are
either uploaded in the same request or already accessible by the user.
This prevents users from referencing blobs they don't have access to
without providing the actual content.

Also reorders validation to run before R2 uploads, preventing orphaned
data when validation fails.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/rae1hy7zmi90jrzbym8yzhlt
